title: citrus × aurantium
intro: Citrus × aurantium, also known as bitter orange, is a hybrid plant that combines the sweet orange (Citrus sinensis) and the sour orange (Citrus maxima). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium include its potential to aid in weight loss, reduce inflammation, and improve circulation. Bitter orange can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and supplements, often used to support digestive health and boost energy levels.
